did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper focuses on the fabrication and characterization of Ionic Metal-Oxide Thin-Film Transistors (TFTs) for RF switching applications. It does not involve dermatology, skin lesions, or any AI/machine learning methods for medical diagnosis or analysis.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
